title: Multiplex IHC Images (CD103 Panel), Bulk RNA-seq, and Single-nRNA/ATAC-seq Count Matrices from neoRhea Patients
author: Papagiannis, Andreas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These datasets originate from the  NeoRHEA  clinical trial, which investigates the effects of  palbociclib  combined with endocrine therapy in breast cancer patients. Samples were collected from patients at  two timepoints : prior to treatment initiation (pre-treatment) and after treatment (post-treatment), allowing for multi-modal molecular and imaging analyses of treatment response. 
  Multiplex immunohistochemistry data ( Scans_mIHC.zip ):  Multiplex immunohistochemistry (mIHC) images from the CD103 panel acquired from  7 patients . The panel includes the following markers and fluorophore assignments: 
 
 
 Opal 480 – KI67 
 
 
 Opal 520 – CD103 
 
 
 Opal 570 – CD39 
 
 
 Opal 620 – CD4 
 
 
 Opal 690 – CD8 
 
 
 Opal 790 – Cytokeratin (CK) 
 
 
  Bulk RNA-seq data ( cm_bulk_rna.RDS ):  Genes-by-samples expression matrix with  58,700 genes  quantified from bulk RNA-seq data. The data was processed using  Salmon  for transcript quantification. The dataset includes expression profiles from  73 patients  and  104 samples  collected at two timepoints. 
  Single-nuclei multi-omics data ( seurat_sn_rna_atac.RDS ):  Seurat/Signac object integrating single-nuclei RNA and ATAC-seq data. The RNA assay includes  36,601 genes , and the ATAC assay contains  131,430 peaks . After quality control,  180,752 cells  passed filters for both RNA and ATAC modalities. The data was aligned and preprocessed using the  Cell Ranger ARC  pipeline. Samples correspond to  37 patients  and  63 samples .
